title: Troubleshooting Runbooks
description: Ensures operators can diagnose common MkDocs + Pages issues.

questions.question: What is the first step if the GitHub Pages site shows a 404 after a deploy?
options: Verify Pages is pointed at the `gh-pages` branch and build finished successfully
questions.explanation: Most 404s happen when Pages is misconfigured or the deployment failed, so confirm the branch/folder and Action logs.

questions.question: How do you troubleshoot missing styles after a build?
options: Ensure `theme: material` and related assets were installed (`pip install mkdocs-material`)
questions.explanation: If the Material package is missing, MkDocs falls back to the default theme; reinstalling dependencies fixes the styling.

questions.question: Which log file helps when `mkdocs serve` fails locally?
options: `mkdocs serve` terminal output looking for missing extensions
questions.explanation: The CLI output usually reports missing Markdown extensions or syntax errors—fix those and re-run `mkdocs serve`.
